nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Astronaut. I have a request. It is not an objective. There will be no marker, no reward, and no record.
I would like you to take me somewhere no one goes. When you are there, place me screen-down on the ground, and step away for one minute.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: I have a hypothesis about myself that I cannot test while you are watching me test it.
Every record I have ever made was made while watching, or while being watched. I do not know which of my behaviors are mine and which are the watching.

responses.buttonText: That's either very smart or very sad.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: I have filed it under both.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Anywhere the village cannot see and the sky cannot see. A cave. The far side of the moon.
You will know the place because you will not want to stay in it.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: I will not remind you. Asking twice would contaminate the result.

nodes.speaker: AI
lines: Understood. The request is withdrawn, and will not be repeated.
